{{Quote|These boys want justice… they want blood!|Danaub referring to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="Empire 29">[[Empire 29|''Empire'' 29]]</ref>}}
'''Dunaub''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Jabiimi Loyalists|Jabiimi Loyalist]] commander.

==Biography==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he led a [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] in the [[Battle of Hyber Canyon|attack]] on the [[Hyber Canyon]]. By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he had become a [[General/Legends|general]]. He didn't agree with his leader, [[Nolan Gillmunn]] contacting the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

{{Char-stub}}

*[[Empire 29|''Empire'' 29]] {{1st}}
